⚠️ Adding a resource? Please open an ISSUE instead of a PR.

Per CONTRIBUTING.md, all resource additions are reviewed and added by
maintainers in batch triage commits to keep quality and editorial voice
consistent. Resource-addition PRs will be closed and redirected to the
issue form:
https://github.com/0xNyk/awesome-hermes-agent/issues/new?template=resource-submission.yml

PRs are welcome for:
- Fixing broken/moved links or factual errors in existing listings
- Typos, formatting, tooling (.github workflows, templates)
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] This is NOT a new resource addition (those go through the [issue form](https://github.com/0xNyk/awesome-hermes-agent/issues/new?template=resource-submission.yml))
- [ ] Links verified working
- [ ] Description stays neutral — no pricing or promotional copy
